title: verbascum × crenulatum
intro: Verbascum × crenulatum, also known as the mullein-verbascum hybrid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Scrophulariaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Verbascum × crenulatum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
